title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 660.528 - Pilot project by department to formulate community response to child abuse and neglect
text:
660.528.  Pilot project by department to formulate community response to child abuse and neglect. — The department of social services shall engage community-based public and private organizations in Jackson County to participate in a pilot project for the purpose of formulating a community response to child abuse and neglect, including hot line investigations, assessments and their dispositions.
(L. 2000 S.B. 757 & 602 § 1)
